name: comdr
description: 通用 Coding Agent — TypeScript 编排层 + Rust 执行层

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/llm packages/tools packages/engine packages/ui
scripts.build:tools: cd crates/comdr-tools && cargo build --release && napi artifacts
scripts.setup: pnpm build && cd packages/ui && pnpm link --global
